This is a deeply emotional and intuitive time. This phase emphasizes intellect and communication. This period promotes new beginnings and action. This is a time for determination and staying the course. Cancer nurtures, encouraging emotional security and care. Aquarius innovates, encouraging uniqueness, rebellion, and new ideas. Mercury governs communication, intellect, and reasoning. Jupiter expands horizons, bringing luck, wisdom, and optimism. A Quincunx (⚻) brings awkward adjustments and unrecognized opportunities. Emotions mix with intellect, encouraging understanding. Action meets determination, driving focused progress toward a goal. The relationship between intellect and expansion reflects on perspective and understanding.
